query: SELECT ub.userId, ub.badgeId, b.slug, b.name, ub.earnedAt FROM user_badges ub JOIN badges b ON ub.badgeId = b.id WHERE ub.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'student@test.com');
